examples: Thee brainteaser features three boxes, each with a drawing of a car on the outside.
Problem solves must work out which number each fruit piece symbolizes in order to crack the brainteaser.
If you fill in squares correctly, options for the remaining ones are narrowed and it becomes easier to solve this brainteaser.
This lame brainteaser from the dreaded Joel Schumacher ("Batman and Robin") is saved by its own ineptitude.
Icstis has also announced new rules which force quiz-based TV shows like Brainteaser to tell viewers their chances of getting through, and how much it will cost.
